summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Codebrit Digital is a London-based full-stack digital solutions agency offering mobile app, web, API, CRM/ERP development, UI/UX design, and digital marketing/SEO services to startups, SMEs, and global brands.

---

- **📍 Locations:** London (UK) and San Diego, California (USA)
- **📞 Key Contact:** +44 7441 916648 / hello@codebrit.co
- **🗓️ Year Founded:** ~2018–2019 (implied from “over 6 years of experience”)
- **📐 Services:** Mobile App Development, API & Extension Development, CRM/ERP Systems, Website Design & Development, UI/UX Design, Digital Marketing & SEO
- **🏭 Client Industries:** Automotive, construction, beauty, health & safety, logistics, agriculture, entertainment, events, fashion, manufacturing, cleaning services
- **🌟 Notable Clients:** None publicly listed; portfolio includes AutoDirect, Moore & Son Bricklaying, Rose Beauty & Aesthetics, LA Health and Safety Consultancy, Carr-i-Freight, Rosemead Angus, Sea Star Productions, Global Sponsor Hub, Giovanna Di Martino, Sym8ry, Munsen Rings, JVC Cleaning, Scotica
- **👥 Team Size:** Not disclosed
- **💰 Revenue:** Not available
- **💻 Tech Stack:** Not specified
- **👔 Decision-Makers:** Not identified in scraped data
